patterns.comment: Minimal model of the real JS grammar's brace nesting. The real grammar opens a nested begin/end context on `{` (objects, blocks, arrow bodies); once inside it, a gsx literal's top-level `#embedded-go-hole` pattern is out of scope. Reproduced here so the go-hole injection is actually exercised by the stub-based grammar tests.
patterns.name: meta.block.js
